TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tamazuan ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 322 buwan, 1,109 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 1,027 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 82 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 90%, Tayan 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tamazuan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Tamazuan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tamazuan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tamazuan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tamazuan hya' ga Laidazuan (Malavi). tay mkyahu' na Tamazuan hya' ga Isingan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tamazuan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu s~ɕinʔij ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, tajan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tamazuan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na tamazuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tamazuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tamazuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tamazuan ħjaʔ ɣa lai*azuan (mala*i). taj mkjaħuʔ na tamazuan ħjaʔ ɣa is~ɕiŋan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Tamazuan ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 322 buwan, 1,109 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 1,027 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 82 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 90%, Tayan 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tamazuan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Tamazuan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tamazuan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tamazuan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tamazuan hya' ga Laidazuan (Malavi). tay mkyahu' na Tamazuan hya' ga Isingan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tamazuan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu s~ɕinʔij ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, tajan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tamazuan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na tamazuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tamazuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tamazuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tamazuan ħjaʔ ɣa lai*azuan (mala*i). taj mkjaħuʔ na tamazuan ħjaʔ ɣa is~ɕiŋan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
